'''fathana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabeard|seabeard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabeard|seabeard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fathana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthænæth|fæthænæth]] || [[word:fæthænæj|fæthænæj]] || [[word:fæthænæsh|fæthænæsh]] || [[word:fæthænæ|fæthænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathathanath|fathathanath]] || [[word:fathathanaj|fathathanaj]] || [[word:fathathanash|fathathanash]] || [[word:fathathana|fathathana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathanath|fathanath]] || [[word:fathanaj|fathanaj]] || [[word:fathanash|fathanash]] || [[word:fathana|fathana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathafnath|fathafnath]] || [[word:fathafnaj|fathafnaj]] || [[word:fathafnash|fathafnash]] || [[word:fathafnaf|fathafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathanatha|fathanatha]] || [[word:fathanaja|fathanaja]] || [[word:fathanasha|fathanasha]] || [[word:fathanaka|fathanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathanath|fathanath]] || [[word:fathanaj|fathanaj]] || [[word:fathanash|fathanash]] || [[word:fathana|fathana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathanathal|fathanathal]] || [[word:fathanajal|fathanajal]] || [[word:fathanashal|fathanashal]] || [[word:fathanakal|fathanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathanathatha|fathanathatha]] || [[word:fathanajaja|fathanajaja]] || [[word:fathanashasha|fathanashasha]] || [[word:fathanaka|fathanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathanathan|fathanathan]] || [[word:fathanajan|fathanajan]] || [[word:fathanashan|fathanashan]] || [[word:fathanakan|fathanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathanathaoro|fathanathaoro]] || [[word:fathanajaoro|fathanajaoro]] || [[word:fathanashaoro|fathanashaoro]] || [[word:fathanakaoro|fathanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
